problems.title: Materialization stale after partial replant extent and child crop-cycle lineage
problems.detail: A whole-field crop-cycle materialization generated before the west-zone replant cannot be reused for high-consequence output because the replant extent created mixed crop-cycle and variety status on only part of the field.
problems.suggestedRemediation: Recompute compliance materialization with the partial extent and child crop-cycle lineage; disclose mixed state in any compiled output.

reasonSummary: The whole-field current-state basis became unsafe after partial replant because accepted truth now differs by sub-extent.
